Contact

Editorial questions, corrections, and partnership enquiries.

The site is built for publishing, not app-style interaction, so the clearest contact method is still email. Use the details below for editorial feedback or business conversations.

Primary email

hello@urbanharvestlab.com

For general enquiries, feedback, and article corrections, email hello@urbanharvestlab.com.

What to include

Make the message easy to action

Include the page URL, the issue you noticed, and any product or growing context that matters. Specific details make corrections and responses much faster.

Future form integration

Contact form placeholder

This static form is included for layout readiness. Connect it to your preferred email or form backend when you are ready to handle submissions directly.

Urban Harvest Lab

Calm, practical growing guidance for balconies, patios, and indoor shelves.

Science-based guides for urban gardening, hydroponics, grow lights, and small-space food growing.

Browse guides About the publication

Contact: hello@urbanharvestlab.com
